text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! If you're free, I'd like your help with something on our day
off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo's got such a serious expression on her face, I agree to do
what I can.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do this! Today, we're getting the full student's-day-off
experience!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Remember the other night at the arcade? I've been thinking
about what those students said.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: I have to run from dawn to dusk, and then they pile up ridiculous amounts of exercises to do on my days off... Is it such a crime to take a break?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I've been shouting at people without hearing their side of the
story. Both tonight... and earlier.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You taught me that I should try being more sympathetic, so I'm giving
it a go!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Today, I wanna research the things students are doing off-campus. I
think that'll give me insight as to why the pair broke curfew!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I just want to be a good disciplinary chair, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All righty, first up on our list is "looking at lip gloss."

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: WAIT?! What the heck are these colors?! Those are definitely against the dress code!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oh boy... I get the sense I'm in for a weird deep-dive into the teenage psyche...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: S-so that was Madonna's Memory...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I heard students gossiping about it being a "suuuper spicy romance," but what was that?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The way she... A-anyways, it's definitely a bad influence on students! None of that was school-appropriate!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Why would they order the couple's special at the cafe?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
How is sharing a drink even a breaktime activity? Wouldn't they
rather get their own?!
choice_data_list: And yet, we're here trying it...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course! This is important research, so drink up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our pitstop at the cafe, we resume the whirlwind tour of teenage
trends, but...
choice_data_list: Hey, Bamboo? Are you actually enjoying this?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Enjoying this? We're not here to goof around. I'm trying to understand
the student body's pastimes!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But I guess it is kinda, um... I dunno, I looked at makeup and watched a movie, but I still don't get why someone'd break curfew for stuff like this.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Does that mean I'm not sympathetic enough?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think she might be getting too caught up in the details to see the
full picture.
choice_data_list: We're just looking at this wrong. Breaks are time to do things you enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Things... I enjoy?
choice_data_list: Yeah, so let's go have fun!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait! Wait for meee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hmm... So games help students get refreshed and ready for training?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The popular games don't seem to be her thing, but I've still got an
idea up my sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Kendo Blade? Whoa, they've got a kendo game?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Press up to aim at the helmet, press the side keys to aim at the
chest... Yeah, this one looks interesting! You're on, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, you got me?! What was that smokescreen?! I couldn't see
anything!
choice_data_list: Yeah, my character's got defensive skills.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But that's not how kendo works! You can't just smoke bomb someone! That's cheating!
choice_data_list:
Maybe, but this isn't real kendo. If you wanna
win, you've gotta play by the game's rules.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Mmph... The rules... The game's rules...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted! I'll beat you by your own rules, just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gah?! A-again! I was just testing out the controls!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Noooooo... Gimme one more shot! I swear I'll get you this round!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Now! HEADSHOT!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I got you! I GOT YOUUU! Did you see that?! I used skills and
everything!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Even in a game, I would never lose a match of kendo!
choice_data_list:
Guess I'll have to get you back in another game,
then!

Guess I'll have to get you back in another game,
then!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you can try all you want. Let's do a round of that game over
there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whew... I suddenly feel tired! I haven't spent this long playing games
in ages.
choice_data_list: So, what's the verdict on downtime?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Y'know, that was a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I really got in the zone and enjoyed myself. Next thing I knew, I'd
forgotten all about my research and felt like my usual red-hot self
again.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's like the rush you get after winning a bout of kendo! ...And I think
now I kinda get why those students needed a breather from all the
serious stuff.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What I said the other day... It was definitely too harsh.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I know races and training are important, but there's more to life. I bet
the two of them had other important things they wanted to do too...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And thanks to you, I was finally able to see that! I really appreciate
everything you've done!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm gonna try talking things over with those two again. I can't
promise things'll work out though...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe, y'know what? You're right!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's spend another day off together some time! It'll be a total blast!
Okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This whole snafu ended up being a really good learning experience
for Bamboo, and she looks a lot happier for it!
